texto: Isn't it funny how the moments that define our lives the most are almost always the smallest? A scattering of almost inconsequential seconds that steer our course; the proverbial butterfly wings which produce the hurricane of our lives. Single sentences, concepts, and choices-especially choices-which make or break who you are, and who you will become.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Brandon M. Herbert que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “Isn't it funny how the moments that define our lives the most are almost always the smallest? A s…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, inspirational-life, lives, com foco em inspiracao e reflexao.
